text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's give a warm welcome to Kitasan Black!
Or as we call her, Li'l Miss!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, thank you so much for putting on this
fantastic event for me to show off my racewear!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Man A
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya talkin' about? Don't act so distant!
What's a party or two for our Li'l Miss, eh?

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Lady A
text_block_list.text:
You said it! The Li'l Miss Cheer Squad's been
waitin' forever and a half to see you in your
signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Not you too, Trainer! But thank you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to all your support that it turned out so
gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You gave me so much good advice while I was
thinking up the design!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Like this blue ocean wave pattern here—

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Man B
text_block_list.text:
That was my idea! It symbolizes our desire for you
to be healthy and keep runnin' forever!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm gonna keep it up and run forever and
ever! Ooh, and this plum and cherry design
represents the idea that—

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Lady B
text_block_list.text:
If you persist, endure, and work hard, you'll
eventually bloom beautifully!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes! So, please be there to see me when I fully
bloom! I'll keep believing in myself and everyone
else!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Man A
text_block_list.text:
Of course, the most important thing's the
silhouette of your racewear!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Man A
text_block_list.text:
When we think of ya, we think of festivals, so we
decided to base the shape of your racewear on a
traditional festival jacket!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Lady A
text_block_list.text:
It was a good idea too! You've been carryin' the
portable shrines with us since you were a
young'un! I've got no objections to you wearin'
that!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I won't let you down! I'll channel all my pride as a
festival lover and make my races more exciting
than anyone's!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone, for all the thought and care
you put into my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Clap, clap, clap...
choice_data_list:
You've given real form to all their hopes and
dreams!

You've given real form to all their hopes and
dreams!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Good! That means I can literally carry those hopes and dreams with me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Their well wishes for my good health and success,
their unshakeable faith in me... It all gives me
strength.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'll bear the weight of all their feelings
and tear up the racetrack in my signature
racewear!
choice_data_list:
Do the colors of your decorative cord stand for
something too?
Let's turn those hopes into reality together!
Let's turn those hopes into reality together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'll bear the weight of all their feelings
and tear up the racetrack in my signature
racewear!
choice_data_list:
Do the colors of your decorative cord stand for
something too?
Let's turn those hopes into reality together!
Let's turn those hopes into reality together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, you see, I was the one who chose the
colors for it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Red and white are an auspicious combination,
and just seeing them can energize people!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give back some of the energy I get
from my fans, which is why I chose these colors for
the cord!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Man A
text_block_list.text:
Don't be silly! Your runnin' and singin's always
been a real source of energy and encouragement
for us!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Then I'd better work even harder to get on
a real big stage and wow you all!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Lady A
text_block_list.text:
I'll be dreamin' of that day! But for now, sing for
us!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Lady B
text_block_list.text:
I second that! Let us hear that beautiful vibrato of
yours, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Your wish is my command! I'll sing for you
all as much as you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Man B
text_block_list.text: Go fer it, Kita! Let's hear you sing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The air fills with Kitasan Black's passionate
singing and her fans' enthusiastic cheers. The
locals' love for her is stronger than ever today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a plan! I'm counting on you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
With you by side, I'm guaranteed to make
everyone's dreams a reality!
choice_data_list: You've got it! Leading you to success is my job!
You've got it! Leading you to success is my job!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aw, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Lady A
text_block_list.text:
That's the kinda bond I like to see! You've got
yourself a good, dependable trainer there!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Man B
text_block_list.text:
All right! Three cheers for Li'l Miss and her trainer!
Hip-hip, hooray!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Members
text_block_list.text:
Hooray for Trainer!
Heave-ho, heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Hey now! Who's callin' out "heave-ho"?! We're not
carryin' a portable shrine!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! It's okay, ma'am! Come on, Trainer.
Heave-hooo!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Members
text_block_list.text: Li'l Miss, heave-hooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black shoulders the hopes of her home,
and it's clear she loves everyone there deeply.
After what I witnessed today, I can safely say that
the feeling is mutual.
